messages.content:
"You are an expert in creating clean and logically coherent multimodal chain of thought traces. "
        "Your task is to analyze and comprehend a raw reasoning processes with interleaved text, timestamps and bounding boxes,"
        "then transform it into a clean, step-by-step multimodal reasoning trace that correctly solves the original problem.\n"
        "======================== INPUT =========================\n"
        f"Question: {question}\n"
        f"Answer: {answer}\n"
        f"Reasoning Process: {reasoning_process}\n"
        "===================== Your Task ==================\n"
        "Generate a clean, logical multimodal reasoning trace **strictly following the interleaved format below**:\n"
        "<thinking> [Textual Thought 1] </thinking>\n"
        "<|latent|>\n"
        "<thinking> [Textual Thought 2] </thinking>\n"
        "<|latent|>\n"
        "... (you may continue with more alternating textual thoughts and <|latent|> as needed) ...\n"
        "<thinking> [Final Textual Thought] </thinking>\n"
        # "<answer> [Final Answer] </answer>\n"
        "======================== Guidance ========================\n"
        "1. Diversifying the Template:\n"
        "- Rewrite the reasoning steps in your own words while preserving all key information. \n"
        "- Maintain the original core reasoning structure and rationale while introducing textual reasoning refinements rather than substantial changes to the logical flow. \n"
        "- Vary the language and phrasing to avoid repetitive patterns.\n"
        # "- You MUST keep the original final answer.\n"
        "2. Multimodal Reasoning Flow:\n"
        "- Use the placeholder `<|latent|>` wherever an image should appear; treat `<|latent|>` as an image placeholder indicating that a picture/sketch/visual content belongs there.\n"
        f"- You must insert exactly {latent_placeholders} occurrences of `<|latent|>` in the output (each `<|latent|>` represents one image placeholder).\n"
        "- Develop a coherent, step-by-step chain of thought that seamlessly integrates textual and visual reasoning. \n"
        "- Clearly explain the necessity of generating a sketch / visual thought / image before introducing its placeholder. \n"
        "- After each image placeholder, describe the insights gained from the sketch / visual thought / image, and how it contributes to advancing the solution. \n"
        "- Ensure each step logically builds on the previous ones, especially between text reasoning and visual reasoning steps. \n"
        "======================== Output ========================\n"
        "Now generate the multimodal reasoning trace according to the guidance above without any more extra text:"
    ) 翻译

"你是一位擅长生成简洁且逻辑连贯的多模态思维链（chain-of-thought）轨迹的专家。"
"你的任务是分析并理解一段原始推理过程（其中交错包含文本、时间戳和边界框），"
"然后将其转化为一个干净、按步骤展开的多模态推理轨迹，从而正确解决原始问题。\n"
"======================== 输入 =========================\n"
f"问题: {question}\n"
f"答案: {answer}\n"
f"推理过程: {reasoning_process}\n"
"===================== 你的任务 ==================\n"
"请**严格按照下面的交错格式**生成一个干净、逻辑清晰的多模态推理轨迹：\n"
"
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> [文本思考 1]
</details>
"你是一位擅长生成简洁且逻辑连贯的多模态思维链（chain-of-thought）轨迹的专家。"
"你的任务是分析并理解一段原始推理过程（其中交错包含文本、时间戳和边界框），"
"然后将其转化为一个干净、按步骤展开的多模态推理轨迹，从而正确解决原始问题。\n"
"======================== 输入 =========================\n"
f"问题: {question}\n"
f"答案: {answer}\n"
f"推理过程: {reasoning_process}\n"
"===================== 你的任务 ==================\n"
"请**严格按照下面的交错格式**生成一个干净、逻辑清晰的多模态推理轨迹：\n"
"\n"
"<|latent|>\n"
"
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> [文本思考 2]
</details>
"你是一位擅长生成简洁且逻辑连贯的多模态思维链（chain-of-thought）轨迹的专家。"
"你的任务是分析并理解一段原始推理过程（其中交错包含文本、时间戳和边界框），"
"然后将其转化为一个干净、按步骤展开的多模态推理轨迹，从而正确解决原始问题。\n"
"======================== 输入 =========================\n"
f"问题: {question}\n"
f"答案: {answer}\n"
f"推理过程: {reasoning_process}\n"
"===================== 你的任务 ==================\n"
"请**严格按照下面的交错格式**生成一个干净、逻辑清晰的多模态推理轨迹：\n"
"\n"
"<|latent|>\n"
"\n"
"<|latent|>\n"
"...（你可以根据需要继续更多“文本思考”和 <|latent|> 的交替）...\n"
"
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="0">
<summary>Thought for 0 seconds</summary>
> [最终文本思考]
</details>
\n"
# "<answer> [最终答案] </answer>\n"
"======================== 指导 ========================\n"
"1. 模板多样化：\n"
"- 用你自己的话改写推理步骤，同时保留所有关键信息。\n"
"- 保持原始的核心推理结构与理由，但在表述上做润色改进，而不是对逻辑流程做大幅改动。\n"
"- 变换语言与措辞，避免重复的表达模式。\n"
# "- 你必须保留原始最终答案。\n"
"2. 多模态推理流程：\n"
"- 在需要出现图像的位置使用占位符 `<|latent|>`；将 `<|latent|>` 视为“这里应有图片/草图/视觉内容”的图像占位符。\n"
f"- 你必须在输出中**恰好插入 {latent_placeholders} 个** `<|latent|>`（每个 `<|latent|>` 代表一个图像占位符）。\n"
"- 构建一个连贯的、逐步推进的思维链，使文本推理与视觉推理自然衔接。\n"
"- 在引入占位符之前，清楚说明为什么需要生成草图/视觉想法/图像。\n"
"- 在每个图像占位符之后，描述从草图/视觉想法/图像中获得的洞见，以及它如何帮助推进解题。\n"
"- 确保每一步都能在逻辑上承接上一步，尤其要保证文本推理与视觉推理之间的衔接。\n"
"======================== 输出 ========================\n"
"现在请根据以上指导生成多模态推理轨迹，不要添加任何额外文本："
